title: Cowrafter
body:
What? Someone said that the [crafter](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Crafter) added in [23w42a](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Java_Edition_23w42a) looks like a cow?

Eh ... I mean ... EXACTLY!

So I made this resource pack, which will turn the crafter into something that is just more like a cow.

More can be seen in the [gallary](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cowrafter/gallery).

What, and why are a or b versions
----

Due to [23w43a](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Java_Edition_23w43a#Blocks_3)'s change to crafters, now crafter's *mouth* opens too wide to be as *cute* as before.

Therefore, I made two packs so anyone can choose between:
- The newer look('a'), used the newest texture.
- The former look('b'), used the first view from 23w42a.
